name: gold-fresh-110-2026-06-05
description: Fresh generality suite — new analyst phrasing across all shapes + all tables + non-data routes (chat/knowledge/tool). Gold executed-validated.

Scenarios.Question: Give me the total number of outage records on file.
Scenarios.ExpectedSql: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM Outages

Scenarios.Question: How many outages were flagged as critical severity?
Scenarios.ExpectedSql: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM Outages WHERE Severity='Critical'

Scenarios.Question: What's the count of work orders that are currently in progress?
Scenarios.ExpectedSql: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM WorkOrders WHERE Status='InProgress'

Scenarios.Question: How many inbound calls did we log?
Scenarios.ExpectedSql: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM CallLogs WHERE Direction='Inbound'

Scenarios.Question: Add up the value of every payment we've received.
Scenarios.ExpectedSql: SELECT SUM(Amount) FROM Payments

Scenarios.Question: What does an average bill come out to?
Scenarios.ExpectedSql: SELECT AVG(TotalAmount) FROM Bills

Scenarios.Question: What is the single largest bill amount we've ever issued?
Scenarios.ExpectedSql: SELECT MAX(TotalAmount) FROM Bills

Scenarios.Question: On average, how many seconds does a call last?
Scenarios.ExpectedSql: SELECT AVG(DurationSeconds) FROM CallLogs

Scenarios.Question: Across all outages, how many affected customers were recorded in total?
Scenarios.ExpectedSql: SELECT SUM(AffectedCustomerCount) FROM Outages

Scenarios.Question: What's the highest consumption figure on any meter reading?
Scenarios.ExpectedSql: SELECT MAX(Consumption) FROM MeterReadings

Scenarios.Question: What's the mean applied percentage across our subsidies?
Scenarios.ExpectedSql: SELECT AVG(AppliedPercent) FROM Subsidies

Scenarios.Question: Break down the outage count by severity level.
Scenarios.ExpectedSql: SELECT Severity, COUNT(*) AS Cnt FROM Outages GROUP BY Severity

Scenarios.Question: Show how many work orders sit in each status.
Scenarios.ExpectedSql: SELECT Status, COUNT(*) AS Cnt FROM WorkOrders GROUP BY Status

Scenarios.Question: How do our bills split out across the different payment methods?
Scenarios.ExpectedSql: SELECT PaymentMethod, COUNT(*) AS Cnt FROM Bills GROUP BY PaymentMethod

Scenarios.Question: Tally up our call logs per channel.
Scenarios.ExpectedSql: SELECT Channel, COUNT(*) AS Cnt FROM CallLogs GROUP BY Channel

Scenarios.Question: How many work orders belong to each region, by region name?
Scenarios.ExpectedSql: SELECT r.NameEn, COUNT(*) AS Cnt FROM WorkOrders w JOIN Regions r ON w.RegionId=r.Id GROUP BY r.Id, r.NameEn

Scenarios.Question: List the maintenance schedules whose type is preventive.
Scenarios.ExpectedSql: SELECT ScheduleNumber FROM MaintenanceSchedules WHERE MaintenanceType='Preventive'

Scenarios.Question: How many CSAT responses gave us a perfect score of 5?
Scenarios.ExpectedSql: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM CsatResponses WHERE Score=5

Scenarios.Question: Count the outage notifications that went out over SMS.
Scenarios.ExpectedSql: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM OutageNotifications WHERE Channel='SMS'

Scenarios.Question: How many bills were issued so far this year?
Scenarios.ExpectedSql: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM Bills WHERE YEAR(IssuedAt)=YEAR(GETDATE())

Scenarios.Question: How much money did we collect in payments this year?
Scenarios.ExpectedSql: SELECT SUM(Amount) FROM Payments WHERE YEAR(PaidAt)=YEAR(GETDATE())

Scenarios.Question: How many outages began in January of this year?
Scenarios.ExpectedSql: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM Outages WHERE YEAR(StartedAt)=YEAR(GETDATE()) AND MONTH(StartedAt)=1

Scenarios.Question: What's our total customer headcount on file?
Scenarios.ExpectedSql: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM Customers

Scenarios.Question: How many customers are currently in an active standing?
Scenarios.ExpectedSql: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM Customers WHERE Status='Active'

Scenarios.Question: Count the customers who have churned and left us.
Scenarios.ExpectedSql: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM Customers WHERE Status='Churned'

Scenarios.Question: Show me the names and email addresses of our customers.
Scenarios.ExpectedSql: SELECT FullNameEn, Email FROM Customers

Scenarios.Question: Break down the customer base by their account status.
Scenarios.ExpectedSql: SELECT Status, COUNT(*) AS Total FROM Customers GROUP BY Status

Scenarios.Question: How are customers distributed across the different regions?
Scenarios.ExpectedSql: SELECT r.NameEn, COUNT(*) AS CustomerCount FROM Customers c JOIN Regions r ON c.RegionId=r.Id GROUP BY r.Id, r.NameEn

Scenarios.Question: What customer segments do we define?
Scenarios.ExpectedSql: SELECT NameEn FROM CustomerSegments

Scenarios.Question: Which segments qualify for subsidy support?
Scenarios.ExpectedSql: SELECT NameEn FROM CustomerSegments WHERE IsSubsidyEligible=1

Scenarios.Question: Give me the grand total of service accounts on the books.
Scenarios.ExpectedSql: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM ServiceAccounts

Scenarios.Question: How many service accounts sit in a suspended state right now?
Scenarios.ExpectedSql: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM ServiceAccounts WHERE Status='Suspended'

Scenarios.Question: What's the average contracted capacity across all service accounts?
Scenarios.ExpectedSql: SELECT AVG(ContractedCapacity) FROM ServiceAccounts

Scenarios.Question: Tally up service accounts per customer segment.
Scenarios.ExpectedSql: SELECT s.NameEn, COUNT(*) AS Accounts FROM ServiceAccounts a JOIN CustomerSegments s ON a.CustomerSegmentId=s.Id GROUP BY s.Id, s.NameEn

Scenarios.Question: How many service points are flagged as active?
Scenarios.ExpectedSql: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM ServicePoints WHERE IsActive=1

Scenarios.Question: Count the service points grouped by their point type.
Scenarios.ExpectedSql: SELECT PointType, COUNT(*) AS Total FROM ServicePoints GROUP BY PointType

Scenarios.Question: How many assets are in operational status?
Scenarios.ExpectedSql: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM Assets WHERE Status='Operational'

Scenarios.Question: Give me a count of assets for each asset type.
Scenarios.ExpectedSql: SELECT AssetType, COUNT(*) AS Total FROM Assets GROUP BY AssetType

Scenarios.Question: How many technicians are on staff?
Scenarios.ExpectedSql: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM Technicians

Scenarios.Question: How many of our technicians are still active employees?
Scenarios.ExpectedSql: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM Technicians WHERE IsActive=1

Scenarios.Question: On average, how many years of experience do our technicians have?
Scenarios.ExpectedSql: SELECT AVG(YearsOfExperience) FROM Technicians

Scenarios.Question: Group the technicians by their area of specialty and count each.
Scenarios.ExpectedSql: SELECT Specialty, COUNT(*) AS Total FROM Technicians GROUP BY Specialty

Scenarios.Question: List the names of the departments that are still active.
Scenarios.ExpectedSql: SELECT NameEn FROM Departments WHERE IsActive=1

Scenarios.Question: Show each user's login name alongside the role they hold.
Scenarios.ExpectedSql: SELECT u.UserName, r.Name FROM AspNetUsers u JOIN AspNetUserRoles ur ON u.Id=ur.UserId JOIN AspNetRoles r ON ur.RoleId=r.Id

Scenarios.Question: How many regions are on record?
Scenarios.ExpectedSql: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM Regions

Scenarios.Question: What's the number of service types we offer?
Scenarios.ExpectedSql: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM ServiceTypes

Scenarios.Question: Show me the names of every payment method we accept.
Scenarios.ExpectedSql: SELECT NameEn FROM PaymentMethods

Scenarios.Question: Which currency codes are set up in the system?
Scenarios.ExpectedSql: SELECT Code FROM Currencies

Scenarios.Question: What are all the possible ticket statuses?
Scenarios.ExpectedSql: SELECT Name FROM TicketStatuses

Scenarios.Question: List every priority level a ticket can be assigned.
Scenarios.ExpectedSql: SELECT Name FROM TicketPriorities

Scenarios.Question: How many countries are registered?
Scenarios.ExpectedSql: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM Countries

Scenarios.Question: How many distinct complaint types are defined?
Scenarios.ExpectedSql: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM ComplaintTypes

Scenarios.Question: Total number of tariff tiers in the pricing setup?
Scenarios.ExpectedSql: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM TariffTiers

Scenarios.Question: How many tariff records exist altogether?
Scenarios.ExpectedSql: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM Tariffs

Scenarios.Question: Pull up the country record where the English name is Syria.
Scenarios.ExpectedSql: SELECT * FROM Countries WHERE NameEn = 'Syria'

Scenarios.Question: Which currency is flagged as the base currency?
Scenarios.ExpectedSql: SELECT NameEn FROM Currencies WHERE IsBase = 1

Scenarios.Question: How many of our payment methods are digital ones?
Scenarios.ExpectedSql: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM PaymentMethods WHERE IsDigital = 1

Scenarios.Question: Give me each service type along with its unit of measure.
Scenarios.ExpectedSql: SELECT NameEn, Unit FROM ServiceTypes

Scenarios.Question: Name all the resolution types available for closing tickets.
Scenarios.ExpectedSql: SELECT NameEn FROM ResolutionTypes

Scenarios.Question: How many channels can a ticket originate from?
Scenarios.ExpectedSql: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM TicketSources

Scenarios.Question: How many SLA policies are currently active?
Scenarios.ExpectedSql: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM SlaPolicies WHERE IsActive = 1

Scenarios.Question: List out the ticket category names.
Scenarios.ExpectedSql: SELECT Name FROM TicketCategories

Scenarios.Question: How many customer segments have been configured?
Scenarios.ExpectedSql: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM CustomerSegments

Scenarios.Question: How many tickets were logged for the Damascus region?
Scenarios.ExpectedSql: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM Tickets t JOIN Regions r ON t.RegionId = r.Id WHERE r.NameEn = 'Damascus' AND t.IsDeleted = 0

Scenarios.Question: Show me the count of outages that hit the Aleppo region.
Scenarios.ExpectedSql: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM Outages o JOIN Regions r ON o.RegionId = r.Id WHERE r.NameEn = 'Aleppo'

Scenarios.Question: How many bills belong to customers in the Residential segment?
Scenarios.ExpectedSql: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM Bills b JOIN ServiceAccounts sa ON b.CustomerId = sa.CustomerId JOIN CustomerSegments cs ON sa.CustomerSegmentId = cs.Id WHERE cs.NameEn = 'Residential'

Scenarios.Question: What's the number of payments settled using the Cash method?
Scenarios.ExpectedSql: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM Payments p JOIN PaymentMethods pm ON p.PaymentMethodId = pm.Id WHERE pm.NameEn = 'Cash'

Scenarios.Question: Break down the ticket counts by region name.
Scenarios.ExpectedSql: SELECT r.NameEn, COUNT(*) AS TicketCount FROM Tickets t JOIN Regions r ON t.RegionId = r.Id WHERE t.IsDeleted = 0 GROUP BY r.Id, r.NameEn ORDER BY TicketCount DESC

Scenarios.Question: Give me how many outages occurred for each service type.
Scenarios.ExpectedSql: SELECT st.NameEn, COUNT(*) AS OutageCount FROM Outages o JOIN ServiceTypes st ON o.ServiceTypeId = st.Id GROUP BY st.Id, st.NameEn ORDER BY OutageCount DESC

Scenarios.Question: Total payment amount collected for each payment method, please.
Scenarios.ExpectedSql: SELECT pm.NameEn, SUM(p.Amount) AS TotalAmount FROM Payments p JOIN PaymentMethods pm ON p.PaymentMethodId = pm.Id GROUP BY pm.Id, pm.NameEn ORDER BY TotalAmount DESC

Scenarios.Question: Sum up the total billed amount per service type.
Scenarios.ExpectedSql: SELECT st.NameEn, SUM(b.TotalAmount) AS TotalBilled FROM Bills b JOIN ServiceTypes st ON b.ServiceTypeId = st.Id GROUP BY st.Id, st.NameEn ORDER BY TotalBilled DESC

Scenarios.Question: List regions that experienced 5 or more outages along with how many.
Scenarios.ExpectedSql: SELECT r.NameEn, COUNT(*) AS OutageCount FROM Outages o JOIN Regions r ON o.RegionId = r.Id GROUP BY r.Id, r.NameEn HAVING COUNT(*) >= 5 ORDER BY OutageCount DESC

Scenarios.Question: Show customer segments that have more than 100 service accounts.
Scenarios.ExpectedSql: SELECT cs.NameEn, COUNT(*) AS AccountCount FROM ServiceAccounts sa JOIN CustomerSegments cs ON sa.CustomerSegmentId = cs.Id GROUP BY cs.Id, cs.NameEn HAVING COUNT(*) > 100 ORDER BY AccountCount DESC

Scenarios.Question: What are the three regions with the most tickets?
Scenarios.ExpectedSql: SELECT TOP 3 r.NameEn, COUNT(*) AS TicketCount FROM Tickets t JOIN Regions r ON t.RegionId = r.Id WHERE t.IsDeleted = 0 GROUP BY r.Id, r.NameEn ORDER BY TicketCount DESC

Scenarios.Question: Top 5 regions ranked by total affected customers from outages.
Scenarios.ExpectedSql: SELECT TOP 5 r.NameEn, SUM(o.AffectedCustomerCount) AS TotalAffected FROM Outages o JOIN Regions r ON o.RegionId = r.Id GROUP BY r.Id, r.NameEn ORDER BY TotalAffected DESC

Scenarios.Question: How many customers have never received a single bill?
Scenarios.ExpectedSql: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM Customers c WHERE NOT EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM Bills b WHERE b.CustomerId = c.Id)

Scenarios.Question: List the regions that have not had any outages.
Scenarios.ExpectedSql: SELECT r.NameEn FROM Regions r WHERE NOT EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM Outages o WHERE o.RegionId = r.Id)

Scenarios.Question: Count the customers who have never filed a ticket.
Scenarios.ExpectedSql: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM Customers c WHERE NOT EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM Tickets t WHERE t.CustomerId = c.Id AND t.IsDeleted = 0)

Scenarios.Question: How many tickets in the Damascus region were created during 2025?
Scenarios.ExpectedSql: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM Tickets t JOIN Regions r ON t.RegionId = r.Id WHERE r.NameEn = 'Damascus' AND t.IsDeleted = 0 AND t.CreatedAt >= '2025-01-01' AND t.CreatedAt < '2026-01-01'

Scenarios.Question: Number of outages in Aleppo that started in the first quarter of 2025.
Scenarios.ExpectedSql: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM Outages o JOIN Regions r ON o.RegionId = r.Id WHERE r.NameEn = 'Aleppo' AND o.StartedAt >= '2025-01-01' AND o.StartedAt < '2025-04-01'

Scenarios.Question: How many tickets do we have in total, and what's the average CSAT score across all responses?
Scenarios.ExpectedSql: SELECT (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM Tickets WHERE IsDeleted = 0) AS TicketCount, (SELECT AVG(CAST(Score AS decimal(10,4))) FROM CsatResponses) AS AvgCsatScore

Scenarios.Question: Tell me how many cash payments were made and their combined total amount.
Scenarios.ExpectedSql: SELECT COUNT(*) AS CashPaymentCount, SUM(p.Amount) AS TotalCashAmount FROM Payments p JOIN PaymentMethods pm ON p.PaymentMethodId = pm.Id WHERE pm.NameEn = 'Cash'

Scenarios.Question: morning! hope you're having a good one
hey, how's everything going on your end today?
wait, am I talking to an actual person or just an AI?
go on, make me laugh — got a good joke?
when an outage is flagged 'Critical', what is that supposed to tell me?
remind me which fields a bill record actually stores
so what kinds of things are you actually able to help me with here?
I keep mixing these up — how is a ticket different from a work order?
what are all the possible states a bill can move through?
give me the gist — what exactly is this platform for?
right now, how many euros do you get for a single US dollar?
is the whole of France off work tomorrow, or is it a normal weekday?
give me a rundown on Japan — population, capital, that sort of thing
what's the money they actually use over in Brazil?
can you pull up a list of universities located in Cairo?
whereabouts on the map is the city of Aleppo?
convert 100 pounds sterling into dollars for me
which country's official money is the dirham?
